evals.prompt: Please analyze this Kubernetes manifest for security issues. The file is at k8s-analyzer-workspace/test-insecure.yaml
evals.expected_output: Should identify: privileged container, runAsUser 0, hostPID, hostNetwork, docker socket mount, wildcard RBAC, cluster-admin binding, inline secrets, missing probes, single replica, no resource limits. Score should be below 40 (F grade)

evals.prompt: Review this K8s manifest for best practices and cross-resource issues. The file is at k8s-analyzer-workspace/test-mixed.yaml
evals.expected_output: Should identify: Service selector mismatch (app:backend vs app:api), Ingress referencing missing-service, NodePort usage, missing probes, missing security context, missing PDB. Score should be in 50-70 range
